semantic.role: Defines naming conventions for a large monorepo to ensure codebase consistency.
responsibilities: Specify interface naming rule (prefix 'I') in src/types/**/*.ts
Specify test file suffix rule (.test.ts or .spec.ts) in tests/**
Provide severity and reasoning for each rule
outOfScope: Rules for other file types or directories
Rules for class, function, or variable naming

English.purpose: Establish a set of mandatory naming conventions to maintain consistency across a large monorepo codebase.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for all developers contributing to the project, especially those working within the monorepo structure. It applies to TypeScript source files and test files.
key_takeaways: Internal interfaces must use the prefix 'I' (e.g., IUserRepository) to differentiate them from types and classes.
Test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts for proper test runner matching.
Violations are flagged with Warning or Error severity as appropriate.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 制定一套强制性的命名规范，以确保大型 monorepo 代码库的风格一致性。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 本文档面向所有参与项目开发的开发者，特别是在 monorepo 结构中工作的开发者。它适用于 TypeScript 源文件和测试文件。
key_takeaways: 内部接口必须使用前缀 'I'（例如 IUserRepository），以便与类型和类进行区分。
测试文件必须以 .test.ts 或 .spec.ts 结尾，以便测试运行器正确匹配。
违反规则将根据严重性标记为警告或错误。
